title: Law of criminal contempt of court is not meant to protect personal prestige of judges: Rajasthan High Court
description: The law of criminal contempt of court is not meant to protect the personal prestige or ego of individual judges, the Rajasthan High Court said recently.A Division Bench of Justices Farjand Ali and Yogendra Kumar Purohit added that personal criticism of individual judges that is unlikely to scandalise the Court would not fall within the ambit of criminal contempt."The law of criminal contempt is not meant to protect the personal prestige or ego of Presiding Officer as an individual.
